title: Board feel so heavy, feel lagging and sometimes freeze
excerpt:
This happened earlier this week. The board felt very heavy when I tried to reply to an update. 
When I checked the tab usage, it was consuming around 1.5 to 1.6 GB of memory, even though the filtered board view had fewer…

posts.author: Alui (Alui)
posts.cookedHtml:
This happened earlier this week. The board felt very heavy when I tried to reply to an update.

When I checked the tab usage, it was consuming around 1.5 to 1.6 GB of memory, even though the filtered board view had fewer than 10 items.

Screenshot 2025-04-11 1026141204×872 59.2 KB

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alui, Welcome to the community.
I wonder if its worth checking with Monday support on this directly to see if they can suggest anything!? I know the support team has always been proactive trying to resolve my issues!

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: I just tested this. It doesn’t make a difference if you are on a filtered view, or the main table with all the data. The memory usage stays the same.

posts.author: adinap (Adina Pierce)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just checked, and 1 of my boards was at 1.9 GB! The same board on a different tab was 856 MB.

I would love to know what we can do to reduce the memory usage. We’ve had a ticket open since last summer, with still no answers.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Here is what you can do + the explanations: ChatGPT - Board Performance Factors

posts.author: inspiredearth (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml:
As far as I can tell, this is a relatively common issue.

People have been complaining about the performance issues with Monday in numerous forum threads spanning the past 3+ years. It’s also what my client is experiencing. It’s painful for their staff to use the CRM.
